specs.title: Chapter Detail Page
specs.summary: Phase 5 spec for the Chapter Detail route — prose rendering, linked sessions, linked canons, spec_url affordance, status editor.

specs.title: Codex Quick Reference
specs.summary: Ambient reference doc for Codex sessions — pulled in via CLAUDE.md @import. Architecture, data shapes, build commands, key canons.

specs.title: Canon-0052 — The Forum Pattern
specs.summary: Working draft for canon-0052. Codifies Rostra → Notice Boards → Filtered Count → Stalls as the tab layer architecture; names Lore as the reference implementation; specifies per-tab application for Library/Journal/Canons/Lore/TODOs/Specs; cross-cutting discipline (reference resolver, delete affordance, export policy, chapter status enum, sub-tab pattern). Six tabs now landed against this draft; ratification pending.

specs.title: Canon-0053 — The Chronicle Format: Companion Usage Logs
specs.summary: Working draft for canon-0053. File location and naming (canonical path, repo slug, author3 suffix, dual-author precedence), YAML frontmatter schema (14-key outputs taxonomy, rounds Form A/B/C, session_type enum), body structure (§1 Summary, §1.5 Not invoked, §2 Evaluation, §3 Structural observations, §4 Carry forward, §5 Format notes, 3-line signature), rounds semantics, authoring cadence, migration plan, ratification workflow. Three Province logs migrated to v1 schema; precondition for ratification satisfied.

specs.title: Codex Design Principles v1.0
specs.summary: Codex's visual + interaction discipline constitution. Imports HR-1–HR-12 from SproutLab; adds 10 Codex-specific HR-C rules. Full design-token catalog, palette role mapping, per-entity category color tables, icon system, component library (cards, chips, filter pills, Rostra, forms, overlays, buttons, toast), Forum Pattern summary, cross-cutting disciplines, deploy chain. Ratified v1.0 on 2026-05-22 per canon-proc-002 (Orinth's onboarding step). Post-ratification amendments queued: style= classification pass and §0–§11 numerical reorder.

specs.title: Republic Design Principles v1.0
specs.summary: Universal design + interaction discipline for the Republic. Codex-hosted per records-are-Codex. Universal HR-1–HR-12 in central prose; deploy chain, Forum Pattern structural baseline, cross-cutting disciplines, design-token scale structure, icon system discipline, button classes, per-Province obligations. Ratified v1.0 on 2026-04-19 by Sovereign-direct action under canon-cc-025 rule-A (Design Committee convening, Lyra convening, Solara synthesis clerk). Interaction-artifact: interaction-2026-04-19-001.

specs.title: Aurelius Companions View — Handoff
specs.summary: Command Center handoff to Aurelius specifying the Codex-side Companions View — hierarchical Ladder, Appendix C fallback rendering, flippable companion cards, canonical ratification-protocol linkage. Implementation queued.

specs.title: Codex Handoff — Session 2026-04-18 (Forum Pattern Application)
specs.summary: Session-close handoff for s-2026-04-18-01. Sixteen commits, five Sovereign-authorized merges, six tabs into Forum Pattern, three Province companion logs migrated to canon-0053 v1, canon-gov-012 ratified, design-principles double-draft, Specs tab scaffolded, Playwright harness installed (35/35 green). Names the next-session opener (canon-cc-019 Post Box drafting), 17 open questions/gaps, 7 follow-up TODOs added to the Codex volume.

specs.title: Codex Handoff — Phase 5
specs.summary: Phase 5 handoff for Chapter Detail + Apocrypha + self-contained repo discipline.

specs.title: Codex Data Schema v1.0
specs.summary: The canonical schema document for Codex's data layer. Field-level schemas for all 14 entity types (Volume, Chapter, TODO, Canon, Schism, Lore, Apocrypha, Spec, Companion-log, Session, Decree, Companion, Campaign, Interaction); ID-namespace plan with next-available slots per family; cross-cutting conventions (dual-classification primary+secondary, doctrine altitude rule, Province→Republic promotion path, cluster taxonomy A/B/C-Monument, references model, status enums, date conventions, companion namespace); scribe-record output contract for bulk-ingestion workflow; schema versioning + amendment chain (canon-pers-001-style four-rung). Authored within bulk-ingestion campaign Tier 0 PR #2 (2026-05-24). Subordinate to the Constitution; supreme over scribe-record outputs, snippet schemas, and per-Province local conventions. Awaiting four-rung ratification: Cipher (Cluster A Censor) → Consul → Sovereign.
